## Checklist

- [ ] Code is `gofmt`-clean (`gofmt -w .`) and `go vet ./...` passes
- [ ] `go test ./...` passes; I added/updated tests for behavior changes
- [ ] New Go files start with the license header (see CONTRIBUTING.md)
- [ ] No chat content / secrets logged; secrets don't touch `.env`
- [ ] No real phone numbers or personal data in code or tests
- [ ] Tutor engine stays language-agnostic (no hardcoded language strings)
- [ ] Commits use Conventional Commits and are signed off (`git commit -s`)
- [ ] Docs updated if behavior changed (`README`, `CLAUDE.md`, `completo.md`)
